hero.description: Explore how Potential helps users interpret satellite, drone, and environmental data for productivity and quality analysis in smarter potato farming.

about.desc1: Potential is designed to help users understand field conditions and interpret agricultural data through a clear and visual interface. It brings together satellite observations, drone-based imagery, and environmental information to support more informed field analysis.
about.desc2: The platform focuses on productivity and quality analysis, helping users read field-level insights and translate complex agricultural signals into more understandable outputs.
about.feat1_title_desc: Track field variability and vegetation-related insights across different locations.
about.feat2_title_desc: Add closer visual support for understanding plant and field conditions.
about.feat3_title_desc: Review indicators connected to field performance and expected outcomes.
about.feat4_title_desc: Understand how analysis outputs can support quality-related interpretation.

howTo.desc: This section helps users understand how to navigate through the Potential interface and interpret the main analysis areas smoothly.
howTo.step1_desc: Sync satellite coordinates with hardware integrations on your fields.
howTo.step2_desc: Review NDVI maps designed uniquely for potatoes.
howTo.step3_desc: Be notified immediately when soil conditions drop.
howTo.step4_desc: Export PDF reports to share with agronomists instantly.

video.desc: Watch curated short videos about the Potential platform, potato farming techniques, and the critical role of remote sensing.
video.vid1_desc: Understand the fundamental growth stages of potato plants.
video.vid2_desc: Learn how satellite imagery is transforming modern agriculture.

knowledge.desc: This specialized knowledge base simplifies theoretical concepts and connects them directly to the Potential platform's agricultural analysis tools.
knowledge.cta: Want to see these concepts in action?
knowledge.card1_desc: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index helps detect crop stress before invisible to the human eye.
knowledge.card2_desc: Understand how differential moisture retention impacts potato tuber development.
knowledge.card3_desc: Learn how overlapping drone images create 3D field terrain models for water drainage analysis.

faq.desc: If you can't find what you're looking for, feel free to reach out to our support team directly from the Potential panel.
faq.a1: Potential is a decision support platform designed specifically to monitor potato fields using precision agriculture data.
faq.q2: What kind of data does the platform use?
faq.a2: It uses a combination of satellite imagery (NDVI, moisture), drone footage, and historical environmental hardware data.
faq.a3: No, it acts as an intelligent decision support system (DSS). It highlights areas of concern and provides data, but the agronomic decision is always left to the user.
faq.a4: Productivity analysis tracks plant growth speed, uniformity across the field, and relative vigor to estimate overall yield potential.
faq.a5: Quality analysis looks at stress factors (like sudden drought or disease signatures on leaves) that could negatively impact potato tuber quality.

footer.subtitle: Learning Platform
footer.desc: A premium educational and onboarding experience designed to help users master the Potential platform and its advanced precision agriculture tools.
footer.cta_desc: Ready to put what you've learned into practice? Access your real field data directly.
